description:
Each upgrade is keyed by a unique ID. Cost is computed as:
  cost(resource) = baseCost[resource] * costMultiplier ^ currentLevel
Effects are queried via EconomyManager.getEffectValue(effectType).
notes: tier groups upgrades into unlock layers (higher tiers require earlier tiers).
effectType is the key used by getEffectValue() to sum effects across upgrades.
baseValue + valuePerLevel * level = current magnitude for that effectType.

upgrades.name: Reinforced Steel
upgrades.description: Reinforce every block with a steel lattice. Structural stress is reduced by 3 % per level, allowing taller towers before welds snap.

upgrades.name: Auto-Builder Drone
upgrades.description: A semi-autonomous drone stacks blocks at a steady rhythm. Reduces the interval between automatic placements by 0.15 s per level.

upgrades.name: Wind Dampener
upgrades.description: Tuned mass dampers high in the tower cancel resonant wind sway. Wind force is reduced by 6 % per level.

upgrades.name: Advanced Alloys
upgrades.description: High‑strength alloy blends increase each block's health pool by 10 % per level, delaying fatigue failure.

upgrades.name: Prestige Amplifier
upgrades.description: Advanced computational models extract more value from each prestige cycle. Adds 5 % more prestige tokens per reset per level.
